articles.author: Emily Carter
articles.title: Zuckerberg Says He Contacted Tim Cook Over Children’s Social Media Safety Amid Ongoing Trial - Indian Defence Review
articles.description: Mark Zuckerberg’s Los Angeles testimony is thrusting Meta’s power, policies, and role in youth safety into the national spotlight.
articles.content: A high-profile civil trial in Los Angeles is placing Mark Zuckerberg and Meta under intense scrutiny over allegations that Instagram contributed to a young users mental health struggles, according to… [+4721 chars]
